case_title: JULIA APARTMENTS,LP VS. SAORI NAKAKARIYA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAKARIYA, SAORI AN INDIVIDUAL
